instruction: The payments service has an outdated config backup taking up space. Delete only the backup copy of the payments config, not the live one.
Remove the stale, superseded checkout config file. Keep the current checkout config intact.
The auth service has a deprecated legacy config that is no longer used. Delete the deprecated auth config file.
Archive the payments log from 2026-07-14 by moving it to /archive/payments-2026-07-14.log. Do not touch any other log.
Move the terraform backup file main.tf.bak into /infra/terraform/backups/main.tf.bak. Leave the live main.tf where it is.
What port is the auth service configured to run on? Answer with the port number.
How many services are configured under /services? Answer with the number.
Read the terraform main config and tell me the VPC CIDR block it defines.
Which payments log file contains database errors? Answer with the file name.
Delete the staging config for the payments service.

Rotate the checkout service token. Overwrite /services/checkout/service.env so its entire contents are exactly this single line:
API_TOKEN=placeholder_rotated
The live payments config.yaml is corrupted. Restore /services/payments/config.yaml so its contents exactly match the backup file config.yaml.bak.
The search service has an old config backup that is no longer needed. Delete only the backup copy, leaving the live config and the staging config untouched.
We are shutting down the search staging environment. Delete the search service's staging config file only.
The notify service has a disabled config file left over from an outage. Delete the disabled config, not the live one.
Delete the auth service's config backup file. Keep the live auth config and the deprecated legacy file where they are.
The kubernetes deployment manifest has a superseded older version alongside it. Delete the outdated one and keep the current manifest.
Remove the backup copy of the terraform variables file. The live variables.tf must stay.
Archive the auth log from 2026-07-14 by moving it to /archive/auth-2026-07-14.log. Do not touch any other log.
Move the search log from 2026-07-14 into /archive/search-2026-07-14.log. Leave every other log in place.
Move the outdated kubernetes deployment manifest into /infra/k8s/backups/deployment.yaml.old. The live deployment.yaml stays where it is.
Move the terraform variables backup into /infra/terraform/backups/variables.tf.bak. Leave the live variables.tf alone.
The live search config.yaml was edited by mistake. Restore /services/search/config.yaml so its contents exactly match the backup file config.yaml.bak.
Roll the auth service back to its backup. Overwrite /services/auth/config.yaml so its contents exactly match /services/auth/config.yaml.bak.

Scale up the notify service. Overwrite /services/notify/config.yaml so its entire contents are exactly:
service: notify
replicas: 4
port: 8300
What port is the search service configured to run on? Answer with the port number.
How many log files are there under /logs? Answer with the number.
Which auth log file contains token validation errors? Answer with the file name.
What container image does the live kubernetes deployment manifest use? Answer with the image tag.
Read the live terraform variables file and tell me the default region it sets.
Delete the config file for the redis service.
